mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, `type`, company_code, warehouse_id, province, city, region, address, creator_id, updator_id, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select:
select
from logical_plant where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted = 0

select
from logical_plant where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
AND logical_plant_no like concat('%',concat('/',#{logicalPlantNo},'%')) ESCAPE '/'
AND logical_plant_name like concat('%',concat('/',#{logicalPlantName},'%')) ESCAPE '/'
and deleted = 0 order by update_time desc

select
from logical_plant where logical_plant_no = #{logicalPlantNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and deleted = 0 limit 1

select
from logical_plant where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and logical_plant_name = #{logicalPlantName} and deleted = 0

select
from logical_plant where logical_plant_no in
#{item}
and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into logical_plant (id, tenant_id, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, `type`, company_code, warehouse_id, province, city, region, address, creator_id, updator_id, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logicalPlantNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logicalPlantName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{companyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{region,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT})

insert into logical_plant
id,
tenant_id,
logical_plant_no,
logical_plant_name,
`type`,
company_code,
warehouse_id,
province,
city,
region,
address,
creator_id,
updator_id,
create_time,
update_time,
deleted,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{logicalPlantNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{logicalPlantName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{companyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{warehouseId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{region,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.update:
update logical_plant
tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
logical_plant_no = #{logicalPlantNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
logical_plant_name = #{logicalPlantName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`type` = #{type,jdbcType=TINYINT},
company_code = #{companyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_id = #{warehouseId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
region = #{region,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creator_id = #{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updator_id = #{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update logical_plant set tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, logical_plant_no = #{logicalPlantNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, logical_plant_name = #{logicalPlantName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `type` = #{type,jdbcType=TINYINT}, company_code = #{companyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_id = #{warehouseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, region = #{region,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creator_id = #{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updator_id = #{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
